::: {.callout-important}
## AI-generated — not for publication
The code and prose in this chapter were written by **Claude Code** (an AI coding
agent) under human direction. They have **not** been line-by-line verified by a
human and must **not** be published or cited as-is.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
## Preliminary & unvetted analysis
These are **exploratory** analyses of **preliminary, in-progress** LEVANTE data.
Results have **not** been reviewed or validated and require checking by the
LEVANTE Data Coordinating Center before any use.
:::
